Container.Name: redis
Container.Changes: [center][font size=4]EVCC Official Docker[/font][/center] [b]2026-06-04:[/b] Initial release using official docker
Container.Overview:
Redis is an open source (BSD licensed), in-memory data structure store, used as a database, cache and message broker. Based on official Redis Docker image.
You must create the config file first located at /mnt/user/appdata/redis/conf/redis.conf. See following link to get the files https://redis.io/docs/latest/operate/oss_and_stack/management/config/
If you want to use redis-full.conf, you must change the "Post Arguments" accordingly and refer to https://hub.docker.com/_/redis
There's currently a bug with the template the path for /config isn't properly set. It must be /mnt/user/appdata/redis/conf/
Be sure to chmod to nobody:users the appdata folder and all files.
Container.DonateText: If you like my work please consider Donating.
Container.Requires: Config File must be created at appdata/conf/redis.conf (unless you change mapping) https://redis.io/docs/latest/operate/oss_and_stack/management/config/

Config.Name: Redis Port
Config.Description: This is Redis default connection port.
